arts.ttl: Silva on Arsenal's set-pieces, Iwobi's form and 'emotional' Smith Rowe
arts.sum: Fulham boss Marco Silva sits down exclusively with Sky Sports to discuss how his side will deal with Arsenal's set-pieces, Alex Iwobi's "incredible form" and Emile Smith Rowe's "emotional" first time facing his former side.

arts.sum: The best football tweets from the website that is definitely still called Twitter, featuring Ruben Amorim, the Merseyside Derby (or lack thereof), Arsenal and Everton’s ongoing suffering. arts.ttl: Arteta blocks Arsenal transfer as Liverpool and United eye bargain Bayern deal
arts.sum: football.london says: "I can understand why Mikel Arteta would want to keep Jakub Kiwior, but the Arsenal boss has done himself no favours. Davies will soon be available to sign on a free transfer, and TBR Football claim that the two Premier League clubs view a deal as 'too good to ignore'.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could shift away from previous transfer strategy by rivalling Chelsea for Brazilian star
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly both interested in a potential transfer move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, according to Florian Plettenberg. The talented 18-year-old looks like the latest exciting prospect to emerge at Palmeiras after the recent success of fellow wonderkids Endrick and Estevao Willian. arts.ttl: How to watch Fulham vs Arsenal: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: London derby as Gunners look to continue fine form

arts.ttl: 'I jumped on plane to go to Arsenal and loved boss - but I feel more connected to Fulham'
arts.sum: Luis Boa Morte was plucked from obscurity in Portugal to join Arsenal in 1997 - but it was his move to Fulham two years later that changed everything for the winger

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'closely monitoring' Brazilian teenager amid Chelsea interest
arts.sum: Arsenal's trip to Craven Cottage will see the team face off against former team-mate Emile Smith Rowe, who has become a key player under new boss Marco Silva this season

arts.ttl: Three things spotted in Arsenal training ahead of Fulham
arts.sum: Arsenal are back in Premier League action on Sunday afternoon as they look to make it four league wins in a row when they travel to Craven Cottage to take on Fulham (2pm kick-off). Ahead of the match Arteta has been working on the training pitch with his squad.

arts.ttl: Fulham vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Fulham in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Predicted Lineup vs. Fulham: Premier League
arts.sum: Arsenal looks to get back to winning ways at Craven Cottage after dropping five points to Fulham last season.
